response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed systems experience, including real-time systems and high-performance architectures, but lacks direct fintech or agentic AI leadership at scale. His recent role at re:cinq involved agentic AI infrastructure, which is promising, but his background is more generalist (web, mobile, embedded) rather than fintech-specific. The career gap and lack of executive-level roles also raise concerns about his fit for a CTO position.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise (event-driven architectures, microservices, real-time systems)
Recent hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure (MCP, developer tooling for agent workflows)
Proven ability to scale engineering teams and adopt modern practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No direct fintech or credit-risk system experience, which is a core requirement for the role
Lacks demonstrated executive leadership (10+ years experience but no confirmed CTO or VP-level roles)
Limited experience with regulated environments or financial systems (only indirect exposure via marketing automation)
